subject: Rework UI to Apple design system per DESIGN.md
description:
Transform the semar-kos-finder UI from current sage/steel/peach palette to Apple design system. Key changes:
1. layout.tsx: Add Apple-style translucent glass nav bar (48px, rgba(0,0,0,0.8) + backdrop-filter blur)
2. Map.tsx popup: Restyle to Apple aesthetic - #f5f5f7 background, dark text, Apple Blue (#0071e3) interactive elements only
3. Typography: Use SF Pro Display/Text with proper optical sizing, negative letter-spacing
4. Buttons: Primary CTA in #0071e3, pill links with 980px radius
5. Cards: Subtle shadows, no borders, 8px radius
6. Badge colors: Use dark surfaces (#272729 etc) not colored pastels
7. Body background: #f5f5f7
activeForm: Reworking UI to Apple design system
